sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n85244" key="polupoto/mos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πολῠποτόμος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n85244.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">for excising</tr_> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">πολύποδες,</foreign> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Philum.</author> </bibl> ap. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0718.tlg016:23" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Aët.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">16.23</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
